ascii_renderer.c(3) Library Functions Manual ascii_renderer.c(3)

NAME

ascii_renderer.c - WASM ASCII renderer using libvterm, FreeType, and raylib.

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct ascii_renderer_t

Functions


void ascii_renderer_init (int pixel_width, int pixel_height)
void ascii_renderer_render_frame (const char *ansi_data, size_t len)
void ascii_renderer_resize (int pixel_width, int pixel_height)
int ascii_renderer_get_cols (void)
int ascii_renderer_get_rows (void)
void ascii_renderer_shutdown (void)

Variables


const unsigned char g_font_default []
const unsigned int g_font_default_size

Detailed Description

WASM ASCII renderer using libvterm, FreeType, and raylib.

This module provides real-time ASCII art rendering for the web client. It uses:

  • libvterm for ANSI escape code parsing and terminal emulation
  • FreeType for glyph rasterization (using embedded DejaVu Sans Mono)
  • raylib for single-texture WebGL rendering

The render pipeline: ANSI string → libvterm cell grid → FreeType glyphs → RGB framebuffer → raylib texture → single WebGL draw call

Definition in file ascii_renderer.c.

Function Documentation

int ascii_renderer_get_cols (void )

Get the current number of columns

Returns

Number of columns (terminal width)

  ascii_renderer_get_rows (void )


Get the current number of rows


Returns

void
  ascii_renderer_init (int pixel_width, int pixel_height)


Initialize the ASCII renderer with pixel dimensions


Parameters


pixel_width Canvas width in pixels


pixel_height Canvas height in pixels


Definition at line 112 of file ascii_renderer.c.


112                                                             {
113   log_info("[PERF] ascii_renderer_init START");
114   if (renderer.vt) {
115     log_warn("ascii_renderer_init called but renderer already initialized");
116     return;
117   }
118 
119   renderer.width_px = pixel_width;
120   renderer.height_px = pixel_height;
121   renderer.pitch = ((pixel_width * 3 + 3) / 4) * 4; /* Align to 4 bytes */
122 
123   /* Allocate framebuffer */
124   log_info("[PERF] About to allocate framebuffer: %d bytes",
125            renderer.pitch * pixel_height);
126   renderer.framebuffer =
127       SAFE_MALLOC(renderer.pitch * pixel_height, uint8_t *);
128   log_info("[PERF] Framebuffer allocated");
129   if (!renderer.framebuffer) {
130     log_error("Failed to allocate framebuffer");
131     return;
132   }
133   memset(renderer.framebuffer, 0, renderer.pitch * pixel_height);
134 
135   /* Initialize FreeType */
136   log_info("[PERF] About to FT_Init_FreeType");
137   if (FT_Init_FreeType(&renderer.ft_lib)) {
138     log_error("Failed to initialize FreeType");
139     SAFE_FREE(renderer.framebuffer);
140     return;
141   }
142   log_info("[PERF] FT_Init_FreeType done");
143 
144   /* Load embedded DejaVu Sans Mono font */
145   log_info("[PERF] About to FT_New_Memory_Face (font size: %u bytes)", g_font_default_size);
146   if (FT_New_Memory_Face(renderer.ft_lib, g_font_default,
147                           (FT_Long)g_font_default_size, 0, &renderer.ft_face)) {
148     log_error("Failed to load default font");
149     FT_Done_FreeType(renderer.ft_lib);
150     SAFE_FREE(renderer.framebuffer);
151     return;
152   }
153   log_info("[PERF] FT_New_Memory_Face done");
154 
155   /* Set font size: 12pt at 96 DPI */
156   log_info("[PERF] About to FT_Set_Char_Size");
157   FT_Set_Char_Size(renderer.ft_face, 0, 12 * 64, 96, 96);
158   log_info("[PERF] FT_Set_Char_Size done");
159 
160   /* Measure cell dimensions using 'M' */
161   log_info("[PERF] About to FT_Load_Char");
162   FT_Load_Char(renderer.ft_face, 'M', FT_LOAD_RENDER);
163   log_info("[PERF] FT_Load_Char done");
164 
165   renderer.cell_w = renderer.ft_face->glyph->advance.x >> 6;
166   renderer.cell_h = renderer.ft_face->glyph->bitmap.rows;
167   renderer.baseline = (3 * renderer.cell_h) / 4;
168 
169   /* Adjust height for 2:1 aspect ratio */
170   renderer.cell_h = renderer.cell_w * 2;
171 
172   renderer.cols = pixel_width / renderer.cell_w;
173   renderer.rows = pixel_height / renderer.cell_h;
174 
175   log_info("ASCII renderer initialized: %dx%d pixels, %dx%d cells, font size %dx%d",
176            pixel_width, pixel_height, renderer.cols, renderer.rows,
177            renderer.cell_w, renderer.cell_h);
178 
179   /* Initialize libvterm */
180   log_info("[PERF] About to vterm_new");
181   renderer.vt = vterm_new(renderer.rows, renderer.cols);
182   log_info("[PERF] vterm_new done");
183   if (!renderer.vt) {
184     log_error("Failed to create VTerm");
185     FT_Done_Face(renderer.ft_face);
186     FT_Done_FreeType(renderer.ft_lib);
187     SAFE_FREE(renderer.framebuffer);
188     return;
189   }
190 
191   log_info("[PERF] About to vterm_obtain_screen");
192   renderer.vts = vterm_obtain_screen(renderer.vt);
193   log_info("[PERF] vterm_obtain_screen done");
194 
195   /* Note: raylib window will be initialized on first render (lazy init)
196    * This avoids blocking the JS event loop on InitWindow during renderer setup.
197    * In Emscripten, InitWindow can take significant time as it initializes WebGL.
198    * Deferring it to BeginDrawing ensures the JS thread stays responsive. */
199 
200   log_info("[PERF] ascii_renderer_init COMPLETE");
201 }






References g_font_default, g_font_default_size,
    log_error, log_info, log_warn, SAFE_FREE, and
    SAFE_MALLOC.






void
  ascii_renderer_render_frame (const char * ansi_data, size_t len)


Render an ANSI escape sequence frame


Parameters


ansi_data Pointer to ANSI string data


len Length of ANSI string in bytes


Definition at line 208 of file ascii_renderer.c.


208                                                                     {
209   if (!renderer.vt || !renderer.framebuffer) {
210     log_warn("ascii_renderer_render_frame: renderer not initialized");
211     return;
212   }
213 
214   /* Lazy-initialize raylib window on first render
215    * Deferred from init() to avoid blocking JS event loop on InitWindow */
216   if (!renderer.window_initialized) {
217     log_info("[PERF] About to call InitWindow(%d, %d)", renderer.width_px, renderer.height_px);
218     InitWindow(renderer.width_px, renderer.height_px, "ASCII Renderer");
219     log_info("[PERF] InitWindow returned");
220     renderer.window_initialized = true;
221     log_debug("ascii_renderer: window initialized on first render");
222   }
223 
224   /* Lazy-initialize raylib texture on first render
225    * This ensures WebGL context is ready before GPU operations */
226   if (!renderer.texture_initialized) {
227     log_info("[PERF] About to call LoadTextureFromImage");
228     Image img = {
229         .data = renderer.framebuffer,
230         .width = renderer.width_px,
231         .height = renderer.height_px,
232         .mipmaps = 1,
233         .format = PIXELFORMAT_UNCOMPRESSED_R8G8B8,
234     };
235     renderer.texture = LoadTextureFromImage(img);
236     log_info("[PERF] LoadTextureFromImage returned");
237     renderer.texture_initialized = true;
238     log_debug("ascii_renderer: texture created on first render (lazy init)");
239   }
240 
241   /* Clear framebuffer to black */
242   memset(renderer.framebuffer, 0, renderer.pitch * renderer.height_px);
243 
244   /* Feed ANSI data to libvterm */
245   vterm_input_write(renderer.vt, ansi_data, len);
246 
247   /* Rasterize each cell */
248   for (int row = 0; row < renderer.rows; row++) {
249     for (int col = 0; col < renderer.cols; col++) {
250       VTermScreenCell cell;
251       vterm_screen_get_cell(renderer.vts, (VTermPos){.row = row, .col = col},
252                             &cell);
253 
254       int px = col * renderer.cell_w;
255       int py = row * renderer.cell_h;
256 
257       /* Extract colors from cell */
258       uint8_t fg_r = cell.fg.rgb.red;
259       uint8_t fg_g = cell.fg.rgb.green;
260       uint8_t fg_b = cell.fg.rgb.blue;
261       uint8_t bg_r = cell.bg.rgb.red;
262       uint8_t bg_g = cell.bg.rgb.green;
263       uint8_t bg_b = cell.bg.rgb.blue;
264 
265       /* Fill background */
266       fill_rect(renderer.framebuffer, renderer.pitch, px, py,
267                 renderer.cell_w, renderer.cell_h, bg_r, bg_g, bg_b);
268 
269       /* Render glyph - cell.chars[0] contains the Unicode codepoint */
270       uint32_t codepoint = cell.chars[0];
271       if (codepoint != 0 && codepoint != ' ') {
272         FT_UInt glyph_idx = FT_Get_Char_Index(renderer.ft_face, codepoint);
273         if (glyph_idx && !FT_Load_Glyph(renderer.ft_face, glyph_idx,
274                                         FT_LOAD_RENDER)) {
275           FT_GlyphSlot slot = renderer.ft_face->glyph;
276           int glyph_x = px + slot->bitmap_left;
277           int glyph_y = py + (renderer.baseline - slot->bitmap_top);
278 
279           blit_glyph(&slot->bitmap, glyph_x, glyph_y, fg_r, fg_g, fg_b,
280                       bg_r, bg_g, bg_b);
281         }
282       }
283     }
284   }
285 
286   /* Update raylib texture */
287   if (renderer.texture_initialized) {
288     UpdateTexture(renderer.texture, renderer.framebuffer);
289   }
290 
291   /* Render to canvas */
292   log_info("[PERF] About to call BeginDrawing");
293   BeginDrawing();
294   log_info("[PERF] BeginDrawing returned, about to draw");
295   ClearBackground(BLACK);
296   DrawTexture(renderer.texture, 0, 0, WHITE);
297   log_info("[PERF] About to call EndDrawing");
298   EndDrawing();
299   log_info("[PERF] EndDrawing returned");
300 }






References log_debug, log_info, and
  log_warn.






void
  ascii_renderer_resize (int pixel_width, int pixel_height)


Resize the renderer to new pixel dimensions


Parameters


pixel_width New canvas width in pixels


pixel_height New canvas height in pixels


Definition at line 307 of file ascii_renderer.c.


307                                                               {
308   if (!renderer.vt || !renderer.framebuffer) {
309     log_warn("ascii_renderer_resize: renderer not initialized");
310     return;
311   }
312 
313   if (pixel_width == renderer.width_px && pixel_height == renderer.height_px) {
314     return;
315   }
316 
317   log_info("ascii_renderer_resize: %dx%d -> %dx%d", renderer.width_px,
318            renderer.height_px, pixel_width, pixel_height);
319 
320   /* Free old texture */
321   if (renderer.texture_initialized) {
322     UnloadTexture(renderer.texture);
323     renderer.texture_initialized = false;
324   }
325 
326   /* Reallocate framebuffer */
327   SAFE_FREE(renderer.framebuffer);
328   renderer.width_px = pixel_width;
329   renderer.height_px = pixel_height;
330   renderer.pitch = ((pixel_width * 3 + 3) / 4) * 4;
331 
332   renderer.framebuffer =
333       SAFE_MALLOC(renderer.pitch * pixel_height, uint8_t *);
334   if (!renderer.framebuffer) {
335     log_error("Failed to reallocate framebuffer");
336     return;
337   }
338   memset(renderer.framebuffer, 0, renderer.pitch * pixel_height);
339 
340   /* Update terminal dimensions */
341   int new_cols = pixel_width / renderer.cell_w;
342   int new_rows = pixel_height / renderer.cell_h;
343 
344   if (new_cols != renderer.cols || new_rows != renderer.rows) {
345     renderer.cols = new_cols;
346     renderer.rows = new_rows;
347     vterm_set_size(renderer.vt, new_rows, new_cols);
348   }
349 
350   /* Create new texture */
351   Image img = {
352       .data = renderer.framebuffer,
353       .width = pixel_width,
354       .height = pixel_height,
355       .mipmaps = 1,
356       .format = PIXELFORMAT_UNCOMPRESSED_R8G8B8,
357   };
358   renderer.texture = LoadTextureFromImage(img);
359   renderer.texture_initialized = true;
360 
361   log_info("ascii_renderer_resize complete: %dx%d cells", renderer.cols,
362            renderer.rows);
363 }






References log_error, log_info, log_warn,
    SAFE_FREE, and SAFE_MALLOC.






void
  ascii_renderer_shutdown (void )


Shutdown the ASCII renderer and free resources


Definition at line 380 of file ascii_renderer.c.


380                                    {
381   if (renderer.texture_initialized) {
382     UnloadTexture(renderer.texture);
383     renderer.texture_initialized = false;
384   }
385 
386   if (renderer.vt) {
387     vterm_free(renderer.vt);
388     renderer.vt = NULL;
389   }
390 
391   if (renderer.ft_face) {
392     FT_Done_Face(renderer.ft_face);
393   }
394 
395   if (renderer.ft_lib) {
396     FT_Done_FreeType(renderer.ft_lib);
397   }
398 
399   if (renderer.framebuffer) {
400     SAFE_FREE(renderer.framebuffer);
401   }
402 
403   memset(&renderer, 0, sizeof(renderer));
404   log_info("ASCII renderer shut down");
405 }






References log_info, and SAFE_FREE.
